side_compiler.note: HEAD of master as of 2026-04-30. Must use GOTOOLCHAIN=local.

optimization_backlog.name: regalloc-spill-weight-around-calls
optimization_backlog.note: doCompact inner loop spills 8 regs around mapassign. Improving spill weights for loop-carried values could reduce overhead.

optimization_backlog.name: slice-noshrink-bce
optimization_backlog.note: Need alias analysis to prove slice doesn't shrink across calls. Fundamental compiler limitation.

optimization_backlog.name: ssa-phielim-compact-loop
optimization_backlog.note: Requires alias analysis to prove slice not modified by mapassign

optimization_backlog.name: wal-hot-path-profiling
optimization_backlog.note: Profile WAL benchmarks for codegen opportunities in encoding/fsync paths

optimization_backlog.name: revision-map-hash-improvement
optimization_backlog.note: Revision is 16-byte struct used as map key in compact. Check if hash/equality codegen can be improved.

attempt_log.name: strict-sub-signedmin
attempt_log.detail: BCE for reverse iteration blocked by struct field slice

attempt_log.name: strict-ordering-add-relations
attempt_log.detail: No significant benchmark impact. Core issue: walk() BCE blocked by mapassign.

attempt_log.name: nil-guard-inlining-discount
attempt_log.detail: Successfully inlined BTree.Get (cost 81->79, 4 sites). Benchmark showed +5.53% regression on Compact1 (code bloat), no improvement on larger benchmarks. Reverted.

task_substitutions: Tasks 5,3 selected. Task 5 substituted to Task 3 (no new untested optimization). Ran Task 3: identified nil-guard-inlining-discount opportunity, implemented and benchmarked - no improvement, reverted. Updated backlog with new opportunities (regalloc spill weights, WAL profiling, revision map hash).
